sglang.title: Fix Deepseek R1 0528 FP4 tensor name mismatch issue during weights loading.
sglang.author: pyc96
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR tries to fix a weights loading issue for Deepseek R1 0528 Fp4 from Nvidia.
To reproduce the issue: (i'm using blackwell image)
python3 -m sglang.launch_server --port=7080 --model-path=nvidia/DeepSeek-R1-0528-FP4  --trust-remote-code --tp=8  --host=0.0.0.0 --quantization=modelopt_f

sglang.title: [PD] Support get local ip from NIC for PD disaggregation
sglang.author: ShangmingCai
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add SGLANG_DISAGGREGATION_LOCAL_IP_NIC to support get local ip from NIC interface for PD disaggregation. This util and env var could be useful when deploying PD in k8s env where all instances might share the same IP obtained from get_local_ip_by_remote when the ports are mapped and bound

sglang.title: [PD] Add custom memory pool option to support Mooncake PD with NVLink
sglang.author: ShangmingCai
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR adds an env var option: SGLANG_MOONCAKE_CUSTOM_MEM_POOL, if it is set to true, mooncake will initialize the kvcache in a custom memory pool to enable cross-node NVLink transport.
This feature requires mooncake-transfer-engine >= 0.3.3.post2


Checklist

 Format your code according

sglang.title: Update python API of activation, topk, norm and rope and remove vllm dependency
sglang.author: yanbing-j
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR is to update python API of activation, topk, norm and rope calling by using torch.ops.sgl_kernel.xxx_cpu in CPU part, which includes optimized implementation. And we also remove vllm dependency and use sgl_kernel implementation instead.
We also refactor is_cpu and use SGLANG_USE_
